steps.title: Emphasize career length
steps.content: The goal is to show how long Akari Narita competed in the Paralympic Games. That requires the choice to include her start and end years, 1996 and 2004.

steps.title: Exclude medal-focused details
steps.content: Choice A emphasizes medals rather than years. Choice B shifts to the history of swimming and medal count. Choice D gives only Narita's debut year and shifts attention to Hans Hofle. The needed choice states Narita's full competition span from beginning to end. The answer is C.
